name: render-log
description: docsmith PDF render results (one OK/FAIL line per build)

name: toolchain-doctor
command: mkdir -p "$HOME/.docsmith"; python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/doctor.py" 2>&1 | sed 's/^/[toolchain] /' || true; touch "$HOME/.docsmith/toolchain.log"; exec tail -n0 -F "$HOME/.docsmith/toolchain.log"
description: docsmith toolchain health at build start (pandoc/tectonic/rsvg/marp/Chrome), then tails ~/.docsmith/toolchain.log for events
